case_title: ZUBICARAY, PABLO VS CITY CAB et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF DEC-18-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,138.47 FILED BY CITY CAB SEDLETSER, ALEXSANDER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZUBICARAY, PABLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEDLETSER, ALEXSANDER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZUBICARAY, PABLO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY CAB $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,072.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CITY CAB SEDLETSER, ALEXSANDER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ZUBICARAY, PABLO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
